extensionDescription.message: Generate local live or accurate captions with automatic multilingual speech recognition.

commandDescription.message: Open Any Subtitle for the current tab

setupRequiredDescription.message: Any Subtitle needs the Local Core to transcribe on this computer.

captureDescription.message: This site does not expose audio directly. Record the tab while the video plays, then transcribe it.

loginContentDescription.message: Cookies for the current site are read only when retrying this task.

traditionalChineseLabel.message: Normalize Chinese to Taiwan Traditional Chinese

audioReceivedWaiting.message: Tab audio received. Waiting for speech recognition.

liveStartedWaiting.message: Live captions started. Waiting for tab audio.

cachedTrackUsed.message: Using an accurate track cached within seven days ($COUNT$ cues).

pageTrackLoaded.message: Loaded the page caption track ($COUNT$ cues).

captureRecordingInstructions.message: Recording. Play from the target position, then choose Finish recording and transcribe.

noRetryJob.message: There is no task to retry.

coreDependenciesIncomplete.message: The Local Core is connected, but required tools are not ready.

installCoreFirst.message: Install Any Subtitle Local Core once. Media and transcription will still be processed only on this computer.

noCoreStatus.message: Any Subtitle Local Core is not installed. Open the setup guide.

switchToVideo.message: Switch to a normal HTTP(S) video tab, then click the Any Subtitle toolbar icon again.

noTargetVideo.message: No target video tab was found. Return to the video tab and try again.

modelReadyWaitingAudio.message: Model ready. Waiting for tab audio.

liveRecognizing.message: Live caption recognition is active. Captions appear over the player.

noAudioTimeout.message: No tab audio received. Confirm the video is playing with sound, then stop and retry.

liveCaptureFailed.message: Audio capture failed. Stop and retry.

noAudio.message: No tab audio received. Confirm the video is playing with sound.

captureWaiting.message: Full-playback recording · waiting for tab audio

extensionNoResponse.message: The extension did not respond. Close the popup, click the Any Subtitle toolbar icon again, and retry.

noCaptureSession.message: There is no active full-playback recording.

liveAudioCaptureWaiting.message: Live tab audio capture · waiting for speech

tabAudioTimeout.message: No tab audio received. Confirm the video is playing with sound.

streamTimeout.message: Getting tab audio timed out. Close the popup, click the Any Subtitle toolbar icon again, and retry.

streamUnavailable.message: Unable to get an audio stream for the current tab. Click the toolbar icon again and retry.

inaccessibleTab.message: The current tab is not an accessible HTTP(S) video page. Return to the video tab and reopen Any Subtitle.

cookiesPermissionDenied.message: Cookie permission for the current site was not granted.

installCoreLead.message: The extension captures tab audio and displays captions; your NVIDIA GPU performs transcription locally.

downloadInstallerDescription.message: The small installer downloads FFmpeg, yt-dlp, CUDA Whisper, and caption models from their public release sources.

finishInstallDescription.message: Windows may show a security prompt. Downloads are about 2.5–3 GB and use about 4 GB after installation.

recheckDescription.message: You do not need to reinstall the browser extension.

requirementOs.message: Windows 10 or 11 and Chrome, Edge, or Vivaldi 116+

requirementGpu.message: An NVIDIA GTX/RTX GPU with a working NVIDIA driver

requirementDisk.message: At least 5 GB of free disk space

privacyLead.message: Transcription, temporary audio, and caption caches stay local. Installation downloads tools and models from public release sources; Any Subtitle has no cloud ASR or telemetry.

coreReadyDetail.message: Close this tab, return to the video page, and click Any Subtitle.

coreNotInstalledDetail.message: Download and run the Windows installer, then choose Check again.

coreConnectionFailed.message: Unable to connect to the Local Core
